prompt: Persian miniature painting, 16th century Safavid style, depicting an elaborate royal court scene. A dense, crowded room of courtiers and servants, but the visual weight and intense directional gazes of the king and key advisors are focused entirely on one specific messenger kneeling in the center, completely ignoring the surrounding crowd. Rendered with flat perspective, no shadows, and saturated jewel tones including lapis lazuli, gold leaf, and vermillion. Dense decorative geometric patterns on the architecture, layered flat figures. absolutely no diagrams, no text, no labels, no photographic shading, no modern elements, no 3D depth, no charts.
tradition_approach: Targeted flat perspective, lack of photographic shading, saturated jewel tones, and dense decorative patterns. The concept of 'attention' is mapped to the selective, heavily weighted directional gazes of the court towards a single focal point.
